files.name: welcome.txt
lines: السلام علیکم
I'm Haleemah Malik. A computer science student from Pakistan.
I like creating problems for solutions:
breaking things, fixing things, and learning why they broke.
This little corner is a collection of things I've built, learned,
and explored along the way.

files.name: education.txt
lines: Things I Paid to Learn:
The only thing that interferes with my learning,
is my education - Albert Einstein
Some people change schools. I apparently just changed buildings.
Spent my entire academic journey in H-11 —
from EMS High School, to Punjab College Hill House,
and now BSCS at FAST-NUCES.

files.name: skills.txt
lines: SKILLS: googling efficiently and pretending it was planned.
Tech:
C++ · OOP · Git · GitHub · Linux (Ubuntu)
HTML · CSS · VS Code · Visual Studio · Canva
Video editing · Vibe coding (professionally unprofessional)

• Installing and uninstalling Windows (7+ successful attempts)
• Losing files and learning from the emotional damage
Writing:
Contemporary fiction · Scripts · Blogs · Articles
Novel writing (happen to be one of Pakistan's youngest novelists :p)
SEO writing
Languages:
English · Urdu · Arabic (basic) · Sarf · Nahaw

files.name: tumble-pop.cpp
lines: TUMBLE POP CLONE
A C++ recreation of the classic TumblePop arcade game, built with
object-oriented programming and featuring animations
enemy AI, collision detection, collectibles, and score tracking
Stack: C++ · Linux (Ubuntu)
[ Drop screenshot in assets/tumble-pop.png ]

files.name: metal-slug.cpp
lines: METAL SLUG — STYLE GAME
Side-scrolling action shooter with that retro military-industrial
aesthetic. Pier, submarines, boss bars — the whole deal.
Stack: C++ · OOP · Git · GitHub · Visual Studio
We learned OOP the hard way: by making things explode.
[ Drop screenshot in assets/metal-slug.png ]

files.name: aakhri-mor.cpp
lines: آخری موڑ — AAKHRI MOR
"The Last Turn" — a game set on the streets of Pakistan.
Truck art, rickshaws, dhabas, and that one vendor who definitely
overcharges for apples. Culturally accurate. Emotionally devastating.
Stack: C++ · Vectors · VS Code · Git · GitHub
Probably the most Pakistani thing I've ever compiled.
[ Drop screenshot in assets/aakhri-mor.png ]

files.name: jinnahs-pakistan.md
lines: Jinnah's Pakistan: Islamic State or Secular Nation?
Published on Aware Pakistan
My take on one of the most debated questions in our history.
Spoiler: it's not a yes/no answer, and anyone who says otherwise
is probably selling something.
Read it here:
https://awarepakistan.com/featured/106216/jinnahs-pakistan-islamic-state-or-secular-nation/
TO ADD MORE BLOGS:
Copy the block below into the "files" array in content.json
under the blogs section. The explorer updates automatically.

files.name: the-sky-we-own.txt
lines: THE SKY WE OWN
by Haleemah Malik
Genre: Contemporary Fiction · 500 pages
Tagline: "When they fight, even death surrenders."
A novel about the illegal occupation of Kashmir — told through
fiction because sometimes the truth needs a story to breathe.
This isn't a light read. It's the kind of book that sits with you
after you close it. I wrote every page like it mattered, because it does.
ORDER (Pakistan only — Rs. 1,000)
Order via Dastaan / Mera Qissa:
https://www.meraqissa.com/book/1821
